snapshot_section: Season summary / Race results matrix + Drivers' championship
attribution: Wikipedia contributors, '2026 NASCAR Cup Series', Wikipedia, The Free Encyclopedia. Used under CC-BY-SA 4.0. Race-by-race finish positions and DNF flags transcribed from the Race results matrix; season points from the Drivers' championship table.
transcription_notes: Race-by-race finishes parsed from the Race results matrix table for races 1..12 (Daytona 500 through Go Bowling at The Glen), inclusive.
DNF flag set when the cell background color is #CFCFFF (Wikipedia driver-results legend code for DNF/retired).
Finish position parsed as the leading integer in the cell, stripping annotations: bold/italic pole markers, * (most laps led), F (fastest lap), and 1/2/3 superscripts (stage winners).
Season points come from the Drivers' championship table (top-20 standings snapshot).
No fabrication: cells that are empty/upcoming are omitted from race_by_race.
all_star_excluded_reason: The 2026 NASCAR All-Star Race is an exhibition event awarding no championship points; it is not included in the Race results matrix and is excluded from race-by-race form aggregates.
